# GitHub Copilot instructions

This repo's engineering rules live in [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md). Read that file in full before making any changes — it is the single source of truth for tech stack, file structure, testing requirements (including the mandatory **Red/Green TDD** workflow for AI agents), performance rules, UI component library, JSDoc rules, error handling, and scope boundaries.

**Do not add project rules, preferences, or architectural notes to this file.** If you're tempted to, add them to `CONTRIBUTING.md` instead. This file exists only so that GitHub Copilot (including Copilot Chat and Copilot in the CLI) discovers the canonical reference; its entire content is this pointer.
